title: Looking for Teacher at Cuemath Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Looking for Teacher at Cuemath Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? Cuemath Advisory Limited in Visakhapatnam offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cuemath Advisory Limited:
Cuemath Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cuemath Advisory Limited!
